What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria S.

Tema Roofing and Siding did an amazing job on our vinyl siding. The crew was professional, efficient, and left the job site spotless. Our house looks brand new!

D
David K.

We had some storm damage to our siding, and Tema Roofing and Siding responded quickly and repaired it perfectly. Reasonable prices and great service. Would recommend!

J
Jessica L.

Tema Roofing and Siding installed James Hardie siding on our Victorian twin in West Philly. The result is stunning! The crew was meticulous and paid attention to every detail. Worth every penny.

R
Robert B.

Tema Roofing and Siding fixed our damaged soffit and fascia after a bad storm. They were prompt, professional, and the price was very fair. Highly recommend their services!

Tema Roofing and Siding — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every siding installer project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Tema Roofing and Siding Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific siding installer needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Philadelphia & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Philadelphia, PA and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our siding installer services.

How long does vinyl siding last in Philadelphia's climate?

With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last 20-30 years, even with Philadelphia's harsh winters and humid summers.

Does vinyl siding require painting?

No, vinyl siding is pre-colored and does not require painting, saving you time and money on maintenance.

Can vinyl siding increase my home's value?

Yes, new vinyl siding can significantly enhance your home's curb appeal and increase its market value.

Built on Philadelphia Values

Get a free, no-obligation siding estimate. Call now!
